evidences.title: $ETH This is a 1-day (1D) candlestick chart of ETH/USDT - Binance
evidences.content: The current price is now well above both the MA(7) and MA(25), which is generally a bullish signal in the short term. 2. Trend Analysis: Long-term trend is still bearish, indicated by the downward slope of the MA(99). The gap between the price and MA(99) remains large, suggesting strong overhead resistance in the longer term. 3. Volume Spike: The rise in price is supported by high volume, lending strength to the move. 4. Support & Resistance: Support levels: $1,667 (MA25), $1,646 (MA7), and local bottom at $1,385. Resistance levels: Short-term resistance at $1,830 (24h high), medium-term resistance near $2,220–$2,690 (previous consolidation zones and MA99 proximity). Conclusion: Short-term sentiment: Bullish with strong upward momentum. [...] Short-term sentiment: Bullish with strong upward momentum. Caution: Price is still below the long-term MA(99), so for a longer trend reversal confirmation, ETH would need to reclaim and hold above ~$2,333.
